source: ACARA My School Historical Data 2008-2025 - acara-school-profile-2008-2025.xlsx

matching_notes.strategy: Matched rows by ACARA SML ID. IDs sourced from school-profile-2025.xlsx (2025 snapshot of 89 CSPD schools). No name matching — avoids cross-state false positives.
matching_notes.note_on_school_count: School count per year varies (86-89) as some schools opened after 2008 or appear in history with different IDs
